nombre: Mexico Chiapas Altura Organic - Press Pot & Espresso
name: Mexico Chiapas Altura Organic - Press Pot & Espresso

name: Costa Rica Hacienda La Minita
descripcion: A cup that hits the palate with characteristic citric acidity, opening up to quenching, fruity notes of elegant, ripe apricot. It's the essence of early summer, and makes a satisfying cold brew or iced coffee.

name: Panama Don Bosco
descripcion: Sourced directly from a family farm on the border of Panama and Costa Rica, this is the best expression of a high grown Central American coffee: sweet, elegant, and as pristine as the rainforest that surrounds the farm. Last order date: July 30

name: Ethiopia Refisa Station
descripcion: At the Refisa Washing Station, the best beans from the region are fermented, washed, soaked, and dried before journeying to our roastery. Our signature dark roast then brings out their fruity, floral notes for an elegant and bold cup. Last order date: August 28

name: Faithful Blend
descripcion: As bold in the cup as the 49ers are on the field, our limited release Faithful Blend is back for a limited time. Floral and citrus aromatics open up to lively acidity and sweetness, with a solid body and notes of milk chocolate and hazelnut. Uplifting; smooth, yet long in finish and ample of body. One-time roast Feb 2. Order by Jan 31. Only available in select Northern California regions.
